Interface ILasDatasetEditEvents

Namespace
ESRI.ArcGIS.GeoDatabaseExtensions
Assembly
ESRI.Server.GeoDatabaseExtensions.dll

Provides access to LAS edit events.

[Guid("5A0DF46D-5A7A-41E5-8B52-BD0B6162D8F4")]
[InterfaceType(ComInterfaceType.InterfaceIsIUnknown)]
public interface ILasDatasetEditEvents

Methods

OnLasFileAdded(string)

This event is fired when a new LAS or zLAS file is added to a LasDataset.

void OnLasFileAdded(string fileName)

Parameters

fileName string

Examples

Sample Snippet

OnLasFileRemoved(string)

This event is fired when a LAS or zLAS file is removed from a LasDataset.

void OnLasFileRemoved(string fileName)

Parameters

fileName string

Examples

Sample Snippet
